description_long: This is a modern clothing store facade labeled 'Au Vieux Campeur' with a clean, rectangular structure and a flat roof. The front features two large display windows flanking a central entrance, with the left window showcasing outdoor-themed posters and the right window displaying a mannequin dressed in outdoor apparel under the 'MERRELL' brand. The exterior is primarily light gray with blue signage, and the windows are bordered by simple, unadorned frames. The side views reveal the building's shallow depth and solid construction, with no additional architectural embellishments. The rear of the store is plain, with one window and minimal decoration, emphasizing the utilitarian design typical of urban retail spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular clothing store with large display windows, blue signage, and a central entrance, featuring outdoor-themed displays and a mannequin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large display windows with posters and a mannequin, and prominent blue 'Au Vieux Campeur' signage.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the shallow depth of the building and the plain, unadorned wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single large window and minimal decoration, lacking signage or displays.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the building's narrow profile and plain wall.
attribute_storefront_signage: Large blue text 'Au Vieux Campeur' centered above the entrance; 'MERRELL' branding in blue and white inside the right display window.
attribute_display_windows: Two large rectangular display windows on either side of the entrance; left window with posters, right window with a mannequin and branding.
attribute_mannequins: One mannequin visible in the right display window, dressed in outdoor clothing.
